name: Restless blood
overview: In the series Restless Blood, we step onto the verdant estate of the wealthy family of Peter Veber. Undercover detective Sara Petrič is also taken there, suspecting that Veber's company is hiding a criminal story. Sara meets Peter's right-hand, Lukas, which takes them both into an unpredictable storm of emotions. But the more Sara investigates, the darker things she discovers, until she finally uncovers the deepest buried secret.

trailers.title: Nemirna kri | Uradni napovednik 🎬 | POP TV
